extended_input_schema.hint: Define repeating schedule. Enter whole numbers only.This field can be set to a minimum of 5 minutes.
extended_input_schema.label: Trigger every

extended_input_schema.hint: Select the timezone to use. Leave it blank to use {{authUser.account_timezone}}
extended_input_schema.label: Timezone
extended_input_schema.name: timezone

extended_input_schema.hint: Set date and time to start or leave blank to start immediately. Once recipe has been run or tested, value cannot be changed.
extended_input_schema.label: Start after
extended_input_schema.name: start_after

extended_input_schema.hint: Set the initial items in the list. Defaults to an empty list if not supplied.
extended_input_schema.label: Items
extended_input_schema.name: list_items

extended_input_schema.hint: Multiple values can be seperated by comma. E.g. cn,un,uid.
extended_input_schema.label: Response Attributes
extended_input_schema.name: attributes

extended_input_schema.hint: Select the schema template of the file that is to be retrieved in batches. If you have a sample CSV file in the directory, choose “Provide with sample file” option. If not, select “Provide manually” to define the schema.
extended_input_schema.label: CSV column schema
extended_input_schema.name: schema_type

extended_input_schema.empty_schema_message: <button type="button" data-action="generateSchema">Use a sample CSV file</button> to input all column names at once.
extended_input_schema.empty_schema_title: Provide schema of the columns in your CSV
extended_input_schema.hint: Describe the schema of the columns in the CSV files that needs to be fetched. Only records from the CSV files matching with the provided schema can be fetched, with permitted relaxations. To learn more, click here.
extended_input_schema.label: Column schema
extended_input_schema.name: schema

extended_input_schema.hint: Select the columns to be returned in the output datatree. If left blank, all columns will be retrieved.
extended_input_schema.label: Columns to retrieve
extended_input_schema.name: selected_fields
